_note: Amy's Ann Arbor stay (June 23–July 17) has concluded — venue hours/exhibitions kept for reference; date-specific events from the stay window have been cleared since they're now past.

venues.name: Ann Arbor YMCA
venues.address: 400 W Washington St, Ann Arbor, MI 48103
venues._hours_note: Downtown branch (400 W Washington St). Last confirmed via annarborymca.org July 15, 2026. Was Amy's primary fitness facility during the Ann Arbor stay (concluded July 17); kept for reference.

venues.name: University of Michigan Museum of Art
venues.address: 525 S State St, Ann Arbor, MI 48109
venues._hours_note: Free admission always. Closed Mondays. Extended hours Fridays until 8 PM.

current_exhibitions.title: Zina Saro-Wiwa: Table Manners (Season 1)
current_exhibitions.description: Digital displays exploring themes of identity and cultural practice by British-Nigerian artist Zina Saro-Wiwa.

current_exhibitions.title: American Sampler: Activating the Archive
current_exhibitions.description: Archival materials from UMMA's collection re-examined through a contemporary curatorial lens.

current_exhibitions.title: We Write To You About Africa
current_exhibitions.description: Celebration of African voices and narratives through works from the permanent collection and on loan.

current_exhibitions.title: Jaume Plensa: Behind the Walls
current_exhibitions.description: Large-scale monumental white head sculpture by the internationally recognized Spanish artist, installed on the UMMA exterior.

events.title: Regular gallery admission — free
events.description: Free admission to all galleries. Extended hours Fridays until 8 PM. Next confirmed ticketed event is an artist talk Sep 17, 2026.

venues.name: The Ark
venues.address: 316 S Main St, Ann Arbor, MI 48104
venues._hours_note: Concert venue — open only for events, typically doors 1 hour before showtime. Check individual event pages.

venues.name: Michigan Theater
venues.address: 603 E Liberty St, Ann Arbor, MI 48104
venues._hours_note: Historic cinema and event venue. michigantheater.org/events/ redirected to an unrelated domain again this cycle — could not verify current schedule. Check directly for current film and event schedule. Box office typically opens 30 min before first show.

venues.name: Matthaei Botanical Gardens
venues.address: 1800 N Dixboro Rd, Ann Arbor, MI 48105
venues._hours_note: Grounds open dawn to dusk (approximately 7am–8pm in summer). Conservatory hours may vary. Hours preserved from last confirmed check (site not re-fetched this cycle).
